reviews.review_description: don't download this this isn't a gamewhatever was going on here happened in 2023 now everything's abandoned literally no one's on here . my theory is that this was a limited time experience for japanese people. whatever you're looking for you're not finding it here this isn't even a game. don't waste your time like i did.
its not fair that i have to login but i dunno what my password and email is. Can u pleeeeeeeeaasse, not make me login? 😔🙏🙏🙏
